recommendations.title: Houseboat
recommendations.overview: An Italian socialite on the run signs on as housekeeper for a widower with three children.

recommendations.title: Mrs. Miracle
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Romance
recommendations.overview: Overwhelmed widower Seth Webster is searching for a housekeeper to help him with his unruly six year old twin sons. "Mrs. Miracle" mysteriously appears and quickly becomes an irreplaceable nanny, chef, friend... and matchmaker.

recommendations.title: Rebecca
recommendations.overview: Story of a young woman who marries a fascinating widower only to find out that she must live in the shadow of his former wife, Rebecca, who died mysteriously several years earlier. The young wife must come to grips with the terrible secret of her han

recommendations.title: Yours, Mine and Ours
recommendations.overview: When a widower with ten children marries a widow with eight, can the twenty of them ever come together as one big happy family?

recommendations.title: Las sirvientas calientes 4
recommendations.overview: When a millionaire becomes a widower, he decides to start looking for a woman through the apps on his phone, not knowing that he has to be very careful for that.

recommendations.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
recommendations.overview: Powered with incredible speed, Sonic The Hedgehog embraces his new home on Earth. That is, until Sonic sparks the attention of super-uncool evil genius Dr. Robotnik. Now it’s super-villain vs. super-sonic in an all-out race across the globe to stop R

recommendations.title: Ran
recommendations.overview: Shakespeare's King Lear is reimagined as a singular historical epic set in sixteenth-century Japan where an aging warlord divides his kingdom between his three sons.

recommendations.title: Deep Red
recommendations.overview: An English pianist living in Rome witnesses the brutal murder of his psychic neighbor. With the help of a tenacious young reporter, he tries to discover the killer using very unconventional methods. The two are soon drawn into a shocking web of demen

recommendations.title: Maudie
recommendations.overview: Canadian folk artist Maud Lewis falls in love with a fishmonger while working for him as a live-in housekeeper.

recommendations.title: Faster, Pussycat! Kill! Kill!
recommendations.overview: A trio of thrill-seeking go-go dancers kidnap a young girl and attempt to seduce an old rancher and his two sons out of their small fortune, but their scheme doesn't play out as intended.
